/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ok.dir/ok_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ok.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ok.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ok.dir/networkclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ok.dir/jsontools.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ok.dir/networkserver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ok.dir/test/test_jsontools.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ok.dir/test_mock_network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ok.dir/budgetcontroller.cpp.o -o ok.app/Contents/MacOS/ok -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
